focus_points.label: Late arrivals and energy levels
focus_points.reason: Notes mention arriving late to work a lot. Could be a sign of low energy, personal issues, or simply a change in routine — worth exploring what's behind it.

focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard check-in point. If there's something off, feedback channels might reveal or clarify it.
